latin: Explorator audax, cum calathum pretiosissimum quaereret, ab adversario captus est. 'da mihi arcam!' inimicus imperavit. explorator subrisit — sciebat enim arcam periculosiorem esse quam putabant.

questions.prompt: What is the explorer searching for?
Why does the explorer smile when captured?
questions.target: He knows the Ark is more dangerous than his enemies realize
choices: He knows the Ark is more dangerous than his enemies realize
His friends are coming to help

translation: The bold explorer, while seeking the most precious vessel, was captured by an adversary. 'Give me the Ark!' the enemy commanded. The explorer smiled — for he knew the Ark was more dangerous than they thought.
